data.title: LG Electronics continues focus on B2B, AI as core growth strategy
data.description: Priority investment areas include AI-enabled home technologies, smart factory solutions, AI data center cooling systems and robotics.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: How Walmart is using AI
data.description: Walmart's AI efforts cover not just deploying agents, but also building out AI systems that cater to shoppers, employees and partners.

data.title: Spangle AI raises $15 million to build agentic infrastructure for ecommerce
data.description: The company said it has signed nine enterprise customers in its first nine months of operations, including fashion and apparel brands such as Revolve, Steve Madden and Alexander Wang.

data.title: Autotrader pushes ecommerce as economic pressures reshape car buying
data.description: Autotrader said consumer demand for digital and hybrid car-buying experiences continues to grow as buyers look for simpler, more predictable transactions.

data.title: Cloudfy launches B2B ecommerce platform update
data.description: The launch comes as manufacturers and distributors continue to invest in digital sales platforms to meet rising customer expectations for self-service ordering, real-time pricing and tighter integration between ecommerce and core business systems.
